name: Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter, egg, and vanilla until combined and light in color.
2. Gradually beat in the dry ingredients, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the dates, coconut, and 1/4 cup of the nuts.
4. Form the dough into two 1-1/2 inch logs.
5. Roll the remaining nuts (1/4 cup each) around one log.
6. Wrap the logs tightly in waxed paper.
7. Chill or freeze until firm enough to slice, about 30 minutes.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Slice the cookies into 1/4 inch thick rounds using a sharp knife.
10. Place the cookie slices on a nonstick baking sheet.
11. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
12. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
2 cookies = 1 serving
Nutrition information: Fat = 1, Fruit = 1/4 cup dates, Bread crumbs = 1/4 cup walnuts, Calories = 95, Carbohydrates = 11.5 grams, Protein = 1 gram, Fat = 5 grams
